creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
amdmi3      2009-12-22 09:55:35 UTC

  FreeBSD ports repository

  Modified files:
    multimedia           Makefile 
  Added files:
    multimedia/bombono   Makefile distinfo pkg-descr pkg-plist 
    multimedia/bombono/files patch-stream.h 
  Log:
  Bombono DVD is a DVD authoring program.
  It is made easy to use and has nice and clean GUI (Gtk).
  
  The main features of Bombono DVD are:
          +excellent MPEG viewer: Timeline and Monitor
          +real WYSIWYG Menu Editor with live thumbnails
          +comfortable Drag-n-Drop support
          +you can author to folder, make ISO-image or burn directly to DVD
          +reauthoring: you can import video from DVD discs.
  
  WWW: http://www.bombono.org
  - Stas Timokhin
  stast@bsdportal.ru
  
  PR:             138623
  Submitted by:   Stas Timokhin <stast@bsdportal.ru>
  
  Revision  Changes    Path
  1.345     +1 -0      ports/multimedia/Makefile
  1.1       +43 -0     ports/multimedia/bombono/Makefile (new)
  1.1       +3 -0      ports/multimedia/bombono/distinfo (new)
  1.1       +10 -0     ports/multimedia/bombono/files/patch-stream.h (new)
  1.1       +13 -0     ports/multimedia/bombono/pkg-descr (new)
  1.1       +103 -0    ports/multimedia/bombono/pkg-plist (new)
